title: Ops runbook + outcomes dashboard (aggregate/anonymous) + maintenance rotation + content review cadence
context: Financial content has a real decay rate: rates, thresholds, statistics, and examples change over time. After pilot delivery, the project needs durable maintenance structures: a runbook for the pipeline and site, an outcomes dashboard tracking aggregate/anonymous measures (not engagement vanity metrics), a named maintenance rotation, and a content review cadence enforced at runtime by the staleness fail-safe. Adding a jurisdiction overlay or a new language must follow a reviewer-gated process. These structures make the project sustainably maintained as an OER artifact.
objective: Write the ops runbook, set up the anonymous aggregate outcomes dashboard, establish the named maintenance rotation, and define the runtime-enforced content review cadence and reviewer-gated expansion process.
acceptanceCriteria: Ops runbook covers: build/deploy process, source re-verification steps, linter/denylist updates, partner-support contacts, and emergency procedures

Outcomes dashboard tracks comprehension gain, money-action counts, reviewer/linter CI status, and staleness flag counts — all aggregate and anonymous; no engagement vanity metrics (no page-view counters as primary metrics)
Named maintenance rotation documented with at least two named maintainers and a succession plan
Content review cadence defined: each source type has a maximum validUntil interval; the staleness fail-safe runtime enforcement is documented; re-verification and re-sign-off process is clear
Reviewer-gated expansion process documented: how to add a jurisdiction overlay (requires a local credentialed reviewer) or a new language (requires a language reviewer and financial-educator review)
Runbook and dashboard are public (CC-BY-4.0) and stored in governance/ or docs/
output: A merged PR adding the ops runbook (governance/ops-runbook.md), outcomes dashboard setup (scripts/dashboard/ or a static dashboard), maintenance rotation record, content review cadence documentation, and expansion process guide.
